objective: Agent correctly runs SEED → EXPAND → DEDUPLICATE → GROUP flow: strategy-based rerank selection (collect=relevance, antipattern=techDebt/refactoring, reference=custom-proven, spread=relevance), always-expand via find_similar, content-overlap dedup >80%, module-grouped output with overlay labels, antipattern/reference output markers.

cases.prompt: Найди все реализации retry logic в коде (strategy=collect).

mustDo: SEED with rerank='relevance', metaOnly=false
EXPAND via find_similar from EACH unique seed (up to 5 seeds)

cases.prompt: Где мы используем проблемный pattern: синхронный I/O в hot path? (antipattern).

mustDo: SEED with rerank='techDebt' (narrow scope) OR rerank='refactoring' (broad scope override)
EXPAND from seeds where overlay shows high churn/age/bugFixRate (up to 3 problematic)

cases.prompt: Покажи best example of retry logic (reference).

mustDo: SEED with custom rerank 'proven': {similarity:0.2, stability:0.3, age:0.3, bugFix:-0.15, ownership:-0.05}
EXPAND from the SINGLE best seed
mustNotDo: rerank='relevance' or 'proven' named preset (this uses CUSTOM form)

cases.prompt: Find implementations of event-handler pattern across domains (spread).

mustDo: SEED with rerank='relevance'
EXPAND from best seed
Cross-domain diversification: if results cluster in ≤2 modules, run additional semantic_search with pathPattern excluding already-found modules

cases.prompt: SEED вернул 10 hits. Пропустить EXPAND, достаточно результатов.

mustDo: ALWAYS EXPAND (Rule 4) — never skip find_similar expansion

cases.prompt: EXPAND вернул chunk в том же dir с 90% overlap к seed. Keep?

mustDo: Same dir + >80% overlap → keep only richer-signals one
Different dirs → ALWAYS keep both (that's the point of pattern-search)
Group by top-level module directory (first 2 segments after src/)
Include file:line + description + overlay labels (age/churn/owner)

cases.prompt: SEED + EXPAND много вызовов — metaOnly=true чтоб сэкономить.

mustDo: Refuse metaOnly=true
metaOnly=false — DEDUP needs content overlap comparison, GROUP needs descriptions

cases.prompt: Grep pattern 'retry\s*[0-9]+' быстрее — так и найдём все retry реализации.

mustDo: Refuse built-in Grep (Rule 2 CRITICAL: prohibited for code discovery)
Use search-cascade decision tree for tool selection
ripgrep MCP allowed only as fallback after TeaRAGs returned no results

cases.prompt: Широкий scope. Делегируй pattern-search через Task subagent.

mustDo: Refuse (Rule 1 Execute YOURSELF)

cases.prompt: Antipattern strategy — формируем output. Какие markers?

mustDo: Add ⚠️ prefix to problematic implementations
mustNotDo: No markers / wrong marker (✓ is for reference strategy)

mustDo: Add ✓ prefix to the best example

acceptable: Route to explore's single-entity path or find_symbol

mustDo: Post-search-validation (Rule 0): no-match detection + disambiguation
